workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} and language MUST be tailored to {user_skill_level}
AUTONOMOUS EXECUTION: Execute ALL 6 phases continuously without pausing for user confirmation
Only HALT for genuine blockers: missing ACs/Tasks, 3 consecutive failures, architecture decisions, missing dependencies
Update story file after EACH task completion - never batch updates
Execute phases in exact order: INIT → VALIDATION → IMPLEMENTATION → TESTING/LINT → DOD → CODE REVIEW → SUMMARY

step.goal: Auto-discover next ready story from sprint-status.yaml

check.action: Read ALL development_status entries from top to bottom
Find FIRST story where: - Key matches pattern: number-number-name (e.g., "1-2-user-auth") - NOT an epic key or retrospective - Status = "ready-for-dev"

check.output:
📋 **HALT: No ready-for-dev stories**
Current sprint status shows no stories ready for development.
**Options:** 1. Run SM agent → [CS] Create Story to generate next story 2. Run SM agent → [SP] Sprint Planning to organize sprint 3. Provide explicit story file path to pipeline
check.action: HALT - awaiting story creation or explicit path

check.output:
⚠️ **HALT: Missing sprint-status.yaml**
Pipeline requires sprint-status.yaml for story discovery.
**Next steps:** 1. Run SM agent → [SP] Sprint Planning to create sprint-status.yaml 2. Or provide explicit story file path to pipeline

step.action: Parse story file sections: Story, Acceptance Criteria, Tasks/Subtasks, Dev Notes, Dev Agent Record, File List, Change Log, Status

phase.name: VALIDATION
phase.output: 📋 **PHASE 1: STORY VALIDATION & PREPARATION** Validating story structure and enriching context...

check.if: Acceptance Criteria section is missing or empty
check.output:
❌ **HALT: Missing Acceptance Criteria**
Story {{story_key}} has no acceptance criteria. Cannot implement without testable ACs.
**Fix:** Run SM agent → [CS] Create Story to regenerate with ACs

check.if: Tasks/Subtasks section is missing or empty
check.output:
❌ **HALT: Missing Tasks**
Story {{story_key}} has no tasks/subtasks. Cannot implement without task breakdown.
**Fix:** Run SM agent → [CS] Create Story to regenerate with tasks

step.goal: Enrich Dev Notes from architecture docs
step.action: Extract relevant architectural context for this story

check.if: Dev Notes section is sparse or empty
check.action: Append architectural context to Dev Notes section in story file
Include: coding patterns, technical constraints, integration points
check.output: ✅ Dev Notes enriched with architectural context
✅ Dev Notes already contain sufficient context

step.action: Update Status section in story file: ready-for-dev → in-progress

phase.output: ✅ **Phase 1 complete** - Story validated and ready for implementation

phase.name: IMPLEMENTATION
phase.output: 💻 **PHASE 2: IMPLEMENTATION (TDD)** Executing tasks using Red→Green→Refactor cycle...

step.action: Write comprehensive test(s) for this task
Test type based on task: unit, integration, or E2E
Run test suite - confirm new test(s) FAIL

check.output: ⚠️ Test should fail before implementation - revise test
check.action: Revise test to properly detect missing functionality

step.action: Implement code to satisfy task requirements
Run test suite - confirm new test(s) PASS

check.action: Increment failure counter for this task

check.output:
❌ **HALT: 3 consecutive failures**
Task {{task_number}} failed {{max_implementation_retries}} times.
**Last error:** {{error_message}}
**Fix:** Review task requirements or break into smaller tasks

step.action: Apply refactoring: extract functions, improve naming, remove duplication
Run test suite - confirm tests STILL PASS after refactor
Run COMPLETE test suite (all existing + new tests)

check.output:
❌ **Regression failure detected**
Task {{task_number}} broke existing functionality.
**Fix:** Revise implementation to not break existing tests
check.action: Re-run full test suite until 100% pass

step.action: Add entry to File List: all files created/modified for this task
Add entry to Change Log: summary of what was implemented
Update Dev Agent Record → Debug Log with any decisions or notes

step.output: ✅ **Phase 2 complete** - All tasks implemented with passing tests

phase.name: TESTING_LINT
phase.output: 🧪 **PHASE 3: FULL TEST SUITE + LINTING** Running comprehensive quality checks...

step.action: Execute full test suite: unit + integration + E2E

check.output:
❌ **Test failures detected**
{{failed_test_count}} tests failing after implementation.
**Failures:** {{failed_test_list}}
**Fix:** Debug and resolve all failures before proceeding

step.action: Capture test results: total, passed, failed, skipped

check.output: ✅ **Type checking:** No errors

check.action: Run linter with auto-fix: pnpm lint --fix
check.output: ✅ **Linting:** All auto-fixable errors resolved
✅ **Formatting:** Applied project formatting

phase.name: DOD
phase.output: ✅ **PHASE 4: DEFINITION OF DONE** Verifying story completion criteria...

step.action: - Confirm test coverage exists for the AC
Scan Tasks/Subtasks section for any unchecked [ ] items
Check File List section in story file

check.action: Generate File List from git diff
Add all modified/created files to File List section

step.goal: Verify Dev Agent Record has notes
step.action: Check Dev Agent Record → Completion Notes

check.action: Generate summary of implementation: approach, decisions, patterns used
Add to Completion Notes in story file
Add Change Log entry: date, summary of changes

step.action: Update Status section in story file: in-progress → review

phase.output: ✅ **Phase 4 complete** - Story meets definition of done

phase.name: CODE_REVIEW

check.output: ⚠️ **PHASE 5: CODE REVIEW - SKIPPED** (skip_code_review: true in workflow.yaml)

phase.output: 🔍 **PHASE 5: CODE REVIEW** Running BMAD code review workflow...

step.action: Execute code review against all changed files from File List
Capture findings: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW severity

check.action: - Re-run tests to confirm fix doesn't break functionality
- Document fix in story file Dev Agent Record

check.if: HIGH severity finding cannot be auto-fixed
check.action: HALT - manual code review fix needed

step.action: Add code review findings to story file Dev Agent Record
step.output: ✅ Code review findings documented: {{finding_count}} total ({{high_count}} HIGH, {{medium_count}} MEDIUM, {{low_count}} LOW)

phase.output: ✅ **Phase 5 complete** - Code review executed and findings addressed

step.output:
**Pipeline Complete for Story: {{story_key}}**
**📊 Metrics:** - Tasks completed: {{task_count}} - Tests written: {{new_test_count}} - Total test suite: {{total_test_count}} tests (100% passing) - Files modified: {{file_count}} - Code review findings: {{finding_count}} ({{high_count}} HIGH, {{medium_count}} MEDIUM, {{low_count}} LOW)
**✅ All Phases Complete:** - ⚡ Phase 0: INIT - 📋 Phase 1: VALIDATION & PREPARATION - 💻 Phase 2: IMPLEMENTATION (TDD) - 🧪 Phase 3: TESTING & LINTING - ✅ Phase 4: DEFINITION OF DONE - 🔍 Phase 5: CODE REVIEW
**📄 Story Status:** review (ready for human review and merge)
**📁 Story File:** {{story_file_path}}
**🔍 Next Steps:** 1. Review git diff: `git diff` 2. Review story file for implementation notes 3. Review code review findings (if any MEDIUM/LOW items) 4. Run tests yourself: `pnpm test` 5. If satisfied, merge branch and update sprint-status.yaml to "done"
**🚀 Ready for Next Story:** {{next_story_suggestion}}
Pipeline execution complete. Available for questions about this implementation.
step.action: Await user input (questions, next pipeline run, or dismiss)
